authority_notice: Local issue records are repository workflow memory only; they do not create GitHub issues, accept or refute artifacts, grant human review, run verifiers, pass gates, or promote knowledge.

issues.summary:
Demonstrate the basic workspace flow with a private draft claim that depends
on artifact id `definition.graph`.

In a clean template clone, `definition.graph` is provided by the local draft
public seed so the offline demo can validate and build context immediately.
For real work, mount or check out `tcs-kb-public` as the readonly public KB
so `definition.graph` resolves to reviewed accepted public knowledge instead
of the template seed.

Acceptance criteria:
- Keep `claim.example-private` as `status: draft`.
- Do not claim novelty or accepted knowledge.
- Keep the dependency direction private-to-public.
- Do not promote the private claim or the template public seed.
- Run `cosheaf workspace info`.
- Run `cosheaf validate`.
- Run `cosheaf gate run`.
- Run `cosheaf gate run --pr-checklist .github/pull_request_template.md`.
- Run `cosheaf context build issue.example-private-claim` when context-pack
  tooling is available.
issues.title: Explore a private draft claim with public graph context
